title: Reconcile stale RepoGround migration workspaces and the runtime-cutover lease
goal: Classify and safely close or preserve the three incomplete RepoGround migration workspaces and resolve the runtime-cutover lease without deleting evidence, stopping live work or force-releasing a foreign owner.

acceptance.assertion: Tasks, processes, tmux sessions, workspace receipts and lease timestamps are re-read before any close, abandon, cleanup or release action.
Each RepoGround workspace is classified as active, failed with salvage, stale-abandonable or already superseded using immutable evidence.
Workspace manifests, results, logs, receipts and any unique commits remain preserved; checkout deletion requires a separate cleanup plan and exact confirmation.
The runtime-cutover lease is retained for a live owner, transferred through an explicit supported path, or released only after inactivity and ownership are proven.
T025 can acquire its exact resources without conflict, or remains explicitly blocked by a named live owner with evidence.

metadata.source_observation: Workspace 835a1520f349 has a failed unchanged writer and live tmux session; workspaces 259b014f842a and 3042fdd262d0 are incomplete with missing writer worktrees; the cutover lease has no visible running task.
